name: airops-ai
description: AirOps AI — Airline Customer Operations Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install
scripts.seed:py: cd server_python && ..\server_python\venv\Scripts\python -c "from db.factory import run_data_factory; run_data_factory()"
scripts.seed:demo: cd server_python && ..\server_python\venv\Scripts\python -c "from db.seed_scenarios import seed_demo_scenarios; seed_demo_scenarios()"
